name: @ptdl/plugin-change-log
description: Records a rich, status-aware change history: for each configured trigger field (status fields first), every change is logged with who/when/role, the from->to values (with status label/color/icon snapshot), the source of the change, the time spent in the previous value (cycle time), an optional note, and a snapshot of chosen companion fields. Shows the history as a timeline popover and a full drawer.
